1137.issue: [W1137] "common.licenseInformation.link" should not point to this repository's [README.md](https://github.com/Bannsaenger/ioBroker.extron/blob/master/README.md) or LICENSE file

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.3.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" run triggered by tag "v0.3.0" for current release 0.3.0 failed [run #315](https://github.com/Bannsaenger/ioBroker.extron/actions/runs/18875131865).

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Bannsaenger/ioBroker.extron/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5605.issue: [W5605] i18n "admin/i18n" language "de" has 1 outdated key(s) not present in English: Transport Protocol

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_dante" attribute "label" uses key "dante" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8005.issue: [W8005] Latest GitHub release tag (0.1.1) does not match latest npm version (0.3.0).
